title: Data Mining of Complex XML for Financial Audits
scenario: Extract sensitive financial data from a complex XML file, adhering to specific regulations. The XML file contains multiple nested tags, including 'transaction', 'item', and 'cost'. The target LLM output should be a JSON object with the extracted data, including 'date', 'amount', and 'description'. Ensure all extracted data is correctly formatted and free of errors.
constraints: Must use precise and accurate language

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON output meets the constraints and requirements.
Verify the accuracy of the extracted data in the JSON output.
Check if the generated JSON output is structurally correct and follows the required format.
